title: Systemd user service + install script + docs
context: PoECraft v1. Step 6 polish: a systemd user service for background operation + an install script. The --config CLI flag already exists in poecraft/main.py. Mostly structural with light validation (systemd-analyze verify, bash -n) and a final manual verification against a real config. Depends on web-dashboard (the app must run end-to-end first). Settled in grill: POESESSID-only auth, manual in-game filter reload (no auto-reload/ydotool in v1), refresh driven by Client.txt zone changes.
architecture: systemd/poecraft.service: user unit, Type=simple, ExecStart=%h/.local/bin/poecraft (the uv tool install entrypoint), Restart=on-failure RestartSec=5, Environment=POECRAFT_CONFIG=%h/.config/poecraft/config.yaml, WantedBy=default.target. install.sh: uv tool install .; mkdir -p ~/.config/poecraft; cp -n config.example.yaml -> ~/.config/poecraft/config.yaml; mkdir -p ~/.config/systemd/user; cp systemd/poecraft.service; systemctl --user daemon-reload; echo next-step instructions. README.md: Install + Usage + Systemd sections. Confirm main.py --config flag is honored end-to-end (already present).

green.description: Create systemd/poecraft.service (Type=simple, ExecStart the poecraft entrypoint, Restart=on-failure RestartSec=5, Environment=POECRAFT_CONFIG=%h/.config/poecraft/config.yaml, WantedBy=default.target). Validate with systemd-analyze verify if available, else manual review.

Create executable install.sh: uv tool install .; mkdir -p ~/.config/poecraft; cp -n config.example.yaml to ~/.config/poecraft/config.yaml; mkdir -p ~/.config/systemd/user; cp systemd/poecraft.service; systemctl --user daemon-reload; print next-step instructions. `bash -n install.sh` passes; design is idempotent (reruns don't clobber an existing config).

Add Install + Usage + Systemd sections to README.md (uv tool install, edit ~/.config/poecraft/config.yaml with POESESSID + Client.txt path + filter path, systemctl --user enable --now poecraft, dashboard at http://127.0.0.1:8420, note manual in-game filter reload).

With a real POESESSID config: uv tool install .; start the service; confirm the dashboard loads, the grid renders after a zone change, the filter file is rewritten with highlight-only rules, and /overlay redirects to /. Document any gotchas.

design.currentState: No systemd/poecraft.service, no install.sh. --config CLI flag already in main.py. App runs end-to-end after web-dashboard.
design.desiredState: systemd user unit + idempotent install.sh + README docs. Final manual end-to-end verification passes.
design.patterns: Mostly structural (RED: none). Light validation: systemd-analyze verify, bash -n. Manual final verification against a real config.
design.decisions: User systemd service (not system). ExecStart via uv tool install entrypoint. install.sh idempotent (cp -n / guard config). POECRAFT_CONFIG env var.
